assignments.rationale: The one-pan tomato pasta is the textbook fast weeknight dinner the quick-recipe day wants.
The five-container Sunday prep clip maps one-to-one onto the meal-prep day, so the two cooking clips activate two distinct items rather than doubling up.

meta.case: coverage/spread — both clips are food content that could pile onto one cooking item, but the matcher spreads them across the two distinct cooking items (quick recipe vs meal prep) to show range
